results.name: litter
results.description: A litter is a way of carrying people.

results.name: littjara
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of shapeshifters.

results.name: little guy
results.description: Small creatures. Not necessarily cute ones.

results.name: living weapon
results.description: Equipments that attach themselves to a creature they create on ETB.

results.name: llanowar
results.description: A forested region of Dominaria.

results.name: llawan
results.description: The Cephalid empress.

results.name: lo and li
results.description: Elderly twin advisors to the Fire Lord.

results.name: lobotomy
results.description: Exile all cards of a particular name from a player's hand, library, and/or graveyard. See also [nevermore](/tags/card/nevermore), which forbids certain cards from being cast.

results.name: lochmere
results.description: The lake upon which Castle Vantress sits.

results.name: lockdown
results.description: A permanent stays tapped. Named in the Color Pie 2017 article. See also [freeze](freeze).

results.name: locthwain symbol
results.description: A goblet, the symbol of the black faction of Locthwain on Eldraine. It's often represented as the space between two intersecting shapes or faces, similar to the Rubin Vase illusion.

results.name: locus
results.description: Watchposts created by Memnarch on Mirrodin.

results.name: locus palace
results.description: Ixidor's impossible castle.

results.name: logan (marvel)
results.description: From Marvel Comics, an X-man better known as Wolverine.

results.name: loner
results.description: Cards that want you to have only one creature, or creatures that want to be the only creature a player controls

results.name: long feng
results.description: Leader of the Dai Li and Grand Secretariat of Ba Sing Se.

results.name: loose lips
results.description: Depicts a subject with an open mouth (see Knight of the Kitchen Sink)

results.name: loot
results.description: Magic the Gathering's Marketable little guy

results.name: loot
results.description: Draw a card, then discard a card. Mainly blue. See also [rummage](/tags/card/rummage), the red version, which discards then draws.

results.name: loot to library
results.description: Draw, then shuffle cards into your library or put them on the bottom of it. Contrast [brainstorm](brainstorm).

results.name: loporrit
results.description: Rabbit-like race from Final Fantasy, associated with the moon

results.name: lorehold college
results.description: The red-white college in Strixhaven.
